page_content:
MUSC633 Field Methods in Ethnomusicology (3 Credits)

Introduction to ethnographic theory and fieldwork methods (participant observation, interviewing, etc.) in ethnomusicology. Students develop and carry out their own fieldwork projects as part of the course.

Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Music department.

MUSC634 Field Methods in Ethnomusicology II (3 Credits) Advanced training in field research techniques and issues including multimedia recording and data management, interview and survey techniques, grant writing, and research ethics.
